items.title: Delaying Social Security reform raises risks for bond markets and the economy, research finds
items.summary: Social Security's trust fund that helps pay retirement benefits is projected to run out in late 2032. New research finds that may pose serious economic risks.
items.label: other

items.title: McConnell health update demanded by Gov. Beshear as Senate vacancy questions grow
items.summary: McConnell, the former longtime Senate leader who declined to seek an eighth term following a series of health scares, was admitted to a hospital on June 14.
items.label: other

items.title: OpenAI to publicly release GPT-5.6, rolls out conversational AI models
items.summary: OpenAI's chief rival, Anthropic, recently restored access to its latest models following a weeks-long clash with the government.
items.label: other

items.title: Used EVs keep getting more expensive amid Iran war, high gas prices
items.summary: The Manheim Used Vehicle Value Index for EVs — which tracks prices of used vehicles sold at its U.S. wholesale auctions — increased 12% compared to June 2025.
items.label: other

items.title: Bezos' Blue Origin valued at $130 billion in first outside fundraising round
items.summary: Bezos' Blue Origin is raising outside capital in a round valuing the rocket company at $130 billion, sources told CNBC's Andrew Ross Sorkin.
items.label: other

items.title: Waymo to start driverless rides in 4 more U.S. markets as expansion accelerates
items.summary: Waymo has a big lead in the nascent U.S. robotaxi market, and is opening up in more cities.

items.title: Trump says he doesn't want anything to do with Spain: 'Cut off all trade'
items.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump slammed Spain for not contributing enough to NATO, as he attended the defense alliance summit in Turkey.

items.title: Weekly mortgage demand drops as rates remain stuck in a narrow range
items.summary: Mortgage rates barely moved last week and haven't moved much in more than a month. That is resulting in lackluster mortgage demand.

items.title: Trump pours cold water on NATO allies' united front
items.summary: Trump criticized NATO allies over defense spending, attacked Spain and renewed his Greenland push during the alliance’s summit in Turkey.

items.title: China warns about AI risks with Anthropic's Claude Code
items.summary: China said specific versions of Claude Code posed back-door vulnerabilities that could send sensitive information to a remote server.
